Title: Munen...!! Hokori takaki Saiyajin - Bejîta shisu
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Banjô Ginga
Plot: Frieza continues to wail on Vegeta until Goku arrives. After Frieza recognizes Goku as the son of a former opponent, the battle is on. Also, Vegeta, near death, gives a heartfelt speech of remorse for his actions.
